entities.name: Fitbit API

entities.context: Fat Burn, Cardio, and Peak zones extracted from Fitbit heartRateZones summary

entities.name: Active Zone Minutes

entities.context: Python script that extracts steps, active minutes, distance, and HR zones from Fitbit daily summary

entities.name: Distance Tracking
entities.context: Total distance in km extracted from Fitbit distances array, with fallback summation logic

entities.name: Activity Minutes
entities.context: Fitbit metrics: fairlyActiveMinutes and veryActiveMinutes from daily summary

relationships.context: Parses Fitbit API response structures (summary dict with distances, heartRateZones, active minutes)
AZM total is computed from fat burn, cardio, and peak zone minutes
Iterates heartRateZones array to extract per-zone minute counts
Extracts total distance from distances array with fallback sum logic
Reads fairlyActiveMinutes and veryActiveMinutes from summary dict
